n: Chapter 11.5: The Storm in the East

steps.t: The shade of Isildur has interrupted the telling of his tale with a brief aside.
King Isildur of Gondor is at the encampment of Adambel.
A crate of whetstones can be found by the camp-fires to the north in Adambel, the primary Gondorian encampment in Mordor Besieged.
Idle soldiers can be found throughout Adambel. Isildur asked you to deliver whetstones to idle soldiers of the Alliance, as well as to his sons.
Idle soldiers can be found throughout Adambel. Isildur asked you to deliver whetstones to idle soldiers of the Alliance, as well as to his sons.
High King Elendil can be found somewhere within Adambel, the primary Gondorian encampment in Mordor Besieged.
High King Elendil has commanded that you train with soldiers at the encampment of Adambel and remind them not to relax their guard despite the length …
Vëamacil is at Adambel. Now that you have trained with the soldiers, High King Elendil expects you to convey his reprimand to his grandson Vëamacil.
Magoldir is at Adambel, the primary Gondorian encampment in Mordor Besieged.
